import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut cur = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        if neg
          nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
        else
          nums = list.push(nums, cur)
        end
        has = false
        neg = false
        cur = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
      has = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
    else
      nums = list.push(nums, cur)
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, y)
      inserted = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, y)
    end
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
  end
  sorted
end

fn join_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in xs
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line)
  let sorted = sort_list(nums)
  println(join_ints(sorted))
end
